npc=Lord Cedric class=Noble player='i was nice' npc_reply='My day started quietly, but it turned heavy around tax ledgers. By midday, estate workers became the bigger problem. I am honestly exhausted, and that is why I sound heavy right now. I am still cautious with what I share, but I can at least tell you this much. It reminds me of what you said earlier: "Since morning, events kept stacking up. family alliances needed attention, and later tax l". What worries me most is that tax ledgers and estate workers are connected, and one problem keeps feeding the other. The sequence matters, because each event reshapes the next decision. How was your own day, really, not just the polite answer?' sentiment=0.600
